<h2 class="section-title">Dumka and Nearby</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>The Times of India:</strong> ACB arrests clerk in Saraiyahat for taking Rs 5,000 bribe - The Times of India<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">L1</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>ETV Bharat:</strong> दुमका में सीओ कार्यालय के सामने ग्रामीणों का हंगामा, सरकारी जमीन पर बने पूर्व ग्राम प्रधान के घर को तोड़ने का कर रहे थे विरोध - ETV Bharat<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">L2</a></span></li>

<h2 class="section-title">Jharkhand</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Amar Ujala:</strong> Jharkhand PECE Admit Card: झारखंड पॉलिटेक्निक प्रवेश परीक्षा का एडमिट कार्ड जारी, जानिए डाउनलोड करने का तरीका - Amar Ujala<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">J1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">J2</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuAFBVV95cUxQQ3NrWlNMclZYanN1OW9nSHdsWVF5cGpTaFE1ZHRuMGhpTHZfQmphNE9INzBqREppNnZhdng5ZVJPeDRPVFdCeWx2M0p4dWZQOFd3VzhDdnJkSTJKTEU2dFM5ZjluUXh4UTc3bnE1cXNmZDBxSXM1UmF1Y0RIWVl4UGN3RFo1SlVXR3pOODUwc3cya2NkWVJtWkZXMnNBbnBlQVR3UTRjYUxXcHJTSU5vLUx0bXpycGw2?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">J3</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiywFBVV95cUxQdE02d0dSY0hCRDBUM3pKdXRzdG9kUzBiSWtJUXJFWE5YVFNDelhGbFVRTjBwOVl4dnlzZENuQWZaTkpJbHdjVW1xMlhtOFR2bkUtNTJ5VV9mSzV5YTNvVDBGWEo5N05SbjdhQ0JPTm95Q0FwRTdZU0M3M1V4U2x4M05Pd0tPZm13TUY4eHRZZlpnVFNzVGRDZHVMOWpiQTZUZWhDY2xDUXBUZ3huanhCMU9oZUZfUU5WVUIyRVgtbUpnOWR0Z3h2UFRlQQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">J4</a></span></li>
